description.overview: A white variant developed from German Shepherds, the White Swiss Shepherd is gentle, intelligent, and eager to please. They're wonderful family dogs.
description.history: The White Swiss Shepherd originated in Switzerland.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, intelligent, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium or long double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A white variant developed from German Shepherds, the White Swiss Shepherd is gentle, intelligent, and eager to please. They're wonderful family dogs.
